title: Homalocalyx grandiflorus
taxonomy: Homalocalyx grandiflorus is classified as a species within the family Eucryphiaceae, a family of flowering plants native to Australia and New Zealand. The Eucryphiaceae family is part of the larger order Cucurbitales, which also includes other families such as Anisophylleaceae and Coriariaceae. This classification helps to group plants with similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The family Eucryphiaceae is further divided into several genera, with Homalocalyx being one of them. By classifying Homalocalyx grandiflorus within this family, botanists can better understand its position within the plant kingdom.
